subject: feat(auth): add AUTH_BYPASS flag to disable authentication
body:
AuthContext injects a mock user and skips Supabase auth when the flag is
on; the API client swaps the JWT for dev identity headers. Enabled by
default (incl. prod) for now — flip AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED to false in
src/config/authBypass.ts to restore the normal flow.

Note: tool-till-tees still validates JWTs, so backend calls will 401
until the backend also accepts unauthenticated requests.

Tags: auth, dev, temporary
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: high
Debt: added
Epic: dev-auth-bypass
Semver: minor
